renal_GFR.source: Rhodin et al. 2009 glomerular filtration rate maturation model (PMA-based Hill).

CYP1A2.source: Approximate CYP1A2 ontogeny (slow postnatal maturation), PMA-based Hill form (cf. Salem et al. 2014 ontogeny review).

CYP2C9.source: Approximate CYP2C9 ontogeny, PMA-based Hill form (cf. Salem et al. 2014; Upreti & Wahlstrom 2016).

CYP2C19.source: Approximate CYP2C19 ontogeny, PMA-based Hill form (cf. Salem et al. 2014; Upreti & Wahlstrom 2016).

CYP2D6.source: Approximate CYP2D6 ontogeny (relatively early maturation), PMA-based Hill form (cf. Salem et al. 2014).

CYP2E1.source: Approximate CYP2E1 ontogeny, PMA-based Hill form (cf. Salem et al. 2014; Upreti & Wahlstrom 2016).

CYP3A4.source: Approximate CYP3A4 ontogeny, PMA-based Hill form (Salem et al. 2013; Anderson & Holford 2008 framework).

UGT1A1.source: Approximate UGT1A1 (bilirubin/glucuronidation) ontogeny, PMA-based Hill form (cf. Anderson & Holford 2008; Krekels et al. 2012 framework).

UGT2B7.source: Approximate UGT2B7 / morphine clearance ontogeny, PMA-based Hill form (cf. Bouwmeester et al. 2004; Anand et al. 2008).

sulfation.source: Approximate sulfotransferase (SULT) ontogeny — comparatively mature at birth; PMA-based Hill form (cf. paracetamol pathway literature).

hepatic_other.source: Generic hepatic-metabolism maturation placeholder for pathways without a specific curve; flag as low confidence when used.
